body.title: Rework audit-expert — broadest lens per expert + watch_next emission
body.result: Created ~/.claude/skills/audit-expert/SKILL.md + lab/claudecode/cc_skills/audit-expert/SKILL.md: 11-expert panel (Cognitive Scientist, Systems Architect, Safety, HCI, Distributed Systems, ML Engineer, Process/Meta, Security, Reliability, Data Engineer, Product Manager), per-expert output format (≤5 severity-tagged observations, ≤2 watch-for notes via emit_watch_next, 0-1 candidate tickets via /audit-ticket), weekly/monthly/on-demand cadence, area-to-expert mapping, ultraview integration, telemetry via emit_run_record. Model: Opus.
body.description:
audit-expert (renamed from /deep-audit) drops the 'mainly look at X' restrictions. Each of the 11 experts gets the broadest lens of their discipline. Output per expert: top 3-5 observations (severity-tagged); 1-2 watch-for-this-next-time notes (written to theigors/audits/expert/watch_next/); 0-1 candidate ticket drafts (run through audit-ticket before filing).

Cadence: weekly = 3 randomly-rotated experts; monthly = full 11-expert panel; on-demand = pick experts by recently-touched area.

Ultraview integration: big PRs / monthly panel / pre-merge-on-HIGH-inertia → ultraview the candidate diff with 2-3 expert lenses.

Emits per-run record. Model: Opus per expert (low volume, high leverage).

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/audit-expert/SKILL.md (renamed + reworked).
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace telemetry.
**Test plan:** weekly invocation rotates 3 experts; each emits ≤5 observations + ≤2 watch-for notes. Monthly invocation runs all 11. Watch-for from prior expert run hits → recorded. Telemetry recorded.
